## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cd python && pytest`
- [ ] `npx convex typecheck`

## Risk Check

- [ ] No new secrets or private endpoints were added
- [ ] New env vars, setup changes, or optional services are documented
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are described in the PR body
